data.title: Dow Gains Over 200 Points But Records Weekly Loss: Fear Among Investors Eases But Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Eddy Cue Praises 'Severance' For Breaking Through The Noise Globally, Says Apple TV+ Isn't Going To Throw 20 Shows On The Wall Hoping One Will Stick
data.description: Apple's Eddy Cue praised Severance as Apple TV+'s most culturally impactful hit while reaffirming the company's "quality over quantity" strategy in a crowded streaming market.

data.title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp Meets Hyundai Vice Chair to Enhance AI Shipyard, Defense Collaboration Amid Trump's Call for US Shipbuilding Revival
data.description: HD Hyundai Executive Vice Chairman Chung Kisun met with Palantir CEO Alex Karp in Washington, D.C., to advance their AI-powered shipyard project and explore future defense tech collaborations, as Palantir continues its strong financial momentum.

data.title: US Courts New Buyers For TikTok As Deal Deadline Approaches: 'All Four Are Good,' Says Trump
data.description: The Trump administration is reportedly in discussions with four different groups regarding the sale of the Chinese short video platform, TikTok.

data.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Calls Proposed 10% Credit Card Interest Rate Cap 'Disruptive' As Trump, Sanders, And Lawmakers Push For Reform
data.description: Chamath Palihapitiya believes a proposed 10% cap on credit card interest rates would significantly disrupt the financial services industry.
